description: Ocean-themed adjectives for describing underwater and coastal items.
adjectives: Lost beneath the waves, resting on the sea floor.
Rising and falling with the rhythm of the ocean.
Glowing with living light from the deep.
From the lightless depths far below the surface.
Shimmering with the soft iridescence of mother-of-pearl.
Light and frothy, the color of breaking waves.
Brined and preserved by the sea.
Softly glowing in the underwater dark.
From the deepest, darkest trenches of the ocean.
Turned to stone over millions of years.
Saturated with water, heavy and swollen.
Tangled in ribbons of green-brown seaweed.
Smoothed and rounded by years of tumbling sand.
Flashing with rainbow colors that shift with the angle.
Glowing with a ghostly light after dark.
Buoyant and bobbing on the surface.
Smoothed to a shine by the action of the sea.
